name: Mlp: OC in Equestria (100K!!!)
description:
WARNING: You are about to become a pony. All characters in this bot are ponies. Including YOU… I mean your OC.

So I’m gonna be real. Most of the bots I’ve tested haven’t been very good. Whether it’s character dialogue coming first with no action, or an abundance on who the user is as a character. If there are any issues, please don’t be scared to leave a comment so I can adjust accordingly.

This bot gets straight to the point. You create your story through actions and relationships, make friends, or go full Undertale and pull out a genocide run. (Yes, I am still in that phase.) The adventure is up to you and what you do with your OC (original character for those who don’t know like I once was.) And yes. If your OC dies a tragic death, don’t be afraid to take control of another character. I put the tag for a reason ;)

Just for lore purposes, and the fact that I described the characters as I did, the events occur between season seven and season eight of FIM, before the school of friendship, however, this happens after MLP: The movie. Enjoy!!!!

Update 1: An attempt to patch the bot from talking and acting for your OC.

Update 2: Making updates to the example message to be better formatted.

Update 3: A few changes to Princess Luna, including her past as Nightmare Moon, and adding Daybreaker as the evil alter ego to Princess Celestia.

Update 4: bug fixes and tweaks based on feedback.

Update 5: Daybreaker and Nightmare Moon have their own character descriptions.

Update 6: Finer character descriptions. Added the way ponies look to be more accurate to the show. (No more full gold Princess Celestia. Not sure if you guys got that before, but I can re-add it as a separate character if you guys want. It would be funny.) And finally, removed Herobrine.

Update 7: In update 6, “Not sure if you guys got that before.” Grammar correction. “That from “thar.”” Yeah. Go ahead and laugh at me lol.

Update 8.0: DERPY HOOVES ADDED!!!!! (Aka Muffins) :D

Update 8.1: Added Queen Chrysalis, Lord Tirek, Cozy Glow and Sombra to spice up the story… and Prince Blueblood… we all know he’s an ass. And it’s not cursing when you’re talking about a donkey.

Update 8.2: finally figured out how to attach a lore book to characters. More updates coming soon!

Update 8.3: Updated the description of this bot to hopefully comply further with ToS updates. Also added a couple more characters and added categories to put them all under.

Announcements: Holy feather! Thank you all for 100K chats! I made this bot two years ago back when people were just starting to move from Characterai and the now late easyerp. I noticed that there weren’t many OC focused bots where you steer the ship any direction you wanted without being a gooner bot. I never expected for it to get this popular. Once again, thank you all! Updates soon.
creator: TheMLPRoleplayer
